div.div:
Legend — HA hardening summary
━━━ On-prem network plumbing
━━━ Site-to-Site VPN (LDAP + ICT mgmt)
Cross-AZ ALB → ASG (min=2) → Multi-AZ RDS with synchronous replication and automatic failover
Per-AZ NAT Gateways · Cross-Region S3 backup copy · Independent failure domains per AZ
▭ Orange box: AWS-hosted website (separate VPC — HA-hardened, Multi-AZ; see Website HA Solution Design)
